note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. Per-marker ROLE override: the Prompt Manager collection prompt's role is copied onto the marker before expansion (openai.js:1468-1477, `prompt.role = collectionPrompt.role ?? prompt.role`). charPersonality is emitted as role=user and worldInfoAfter as role=assistant; the rest stay system. Also pins ST per-marker FORMAT strings for an IMPORTED preset (wi_format wraps the WI, charDescription BARE, personality_format/scenario_format expand macros — openai.js:780-792,1359-1369). Only a single after_char WI entry is supplied and there is NO worldInfoBefore marker, so RPT's world_info_after fallback (no before-slot) renders the blob at the after marker's role — matching ST here and keeping the role=assistant override observable. The before/after distinct-message SPLIT (both markers populated) is a documented divergence (KNOWN-DIVERGENCES §7), deliberately not exercised here. Adapter-verify at M5 (issue 20); replace with source:'captured' per RUNBOOK.md. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled; ST default strings overridden with ORP_ sentinels.

input.description: charPersonality role=user, worldInfoAfter role=assistant; other markers keep role=system. Single after_char WI entry, no before-marker.

prompts.name: Main
prompts.content: Vornst kelbra directive: uphold the frelquam cadence.

character.name: Kaevo
character.description: Character brindle: Kaevo, a quiet dock-warden of Sill.
character.scenario: A rain-slick pier at the edge of Grennel Bay.

chatMessages.content: Kaevo, did the night skiff ever come back?

worldInfo.content: After-lore: tide-bells ring thrice for a missing skiff.
